case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. GEORGE X. SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X. DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-22-2009
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,676.69 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE; CCP 1033 B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED JUN-28-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X.
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X. $5,015.09 PRINCIPAL, $2,001.91 INTEREST, $294.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,311.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, GEORGE X.
